note: Pre-populated connector catalog for Prevail. App-agnostic: every app is tagged with a connector PATTERN, and each pattern maps to one ingestion tier. Expansive by design (exhaustive coverage), not hand-curated; not every app has a working connector yet. A new app needs only a pattern tag plus an optional fallback ladder.
